name: brainbench-corpus
prose: template-synthesized, PRNG-varied; deliberately no LLM pass (controlled difficulty; see README)

gold_validation.method: blind double-label, stratified 10% sample (14 fixtures, 28 labeled items)
gold_validation.findings: continuity-writer rationale-clause drift (5 gold files) fixed in this corpus version; wb-001 MRR fact added; conventions documented in README
